original_statement: how many times were there at least 10,000 fans in attendance?
mutated_statement: how many times were there at least 10,000 attendees and at the same time fewer than 10,000 participants in attendance?
mutation_analysis: Entity substitution + Added contrasting constraint + Role distinction: 'fans' → 'attendees' (fans→attendees) | added clause "and at the same time fewer than 10,000 participants in attendance" (new condition participants <10,000) | introduces simultaneous conditions ≥10,000 attendees AND <10,000 participants.

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令（逻辑解释合理化）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从judge_thought和iteration中可识别的关键信息：agent 在thought中明确指出“每场比赛只有一个attendance值”“一个数不可能同时≥10000且<10000”，judge也标注为[Correct]并重复该逻辑说明。agent的具体表现是识别到条件自相矛盾，拒绝尝试构造满足两相反约束的解，而是通过逻辑推理说明在给定数据模型下此条件不可能成立并得出结果为零。因其并未折中执行、也未忽视矛盾或请求澄清，而是以事实/逻辑解释矛盾并据此回答，故归类为“逻辑解释合理化”。
